etymology.description: semantic 亻(亻) (rén, "person") + phonetic 喬(喬) (qiáo, "tall") -> to live abroad
etymology.interpretation: The character 僑 (qiáo), meaning 'to live abroad', combines the semantic element 亻(亻) (rén, 'person') with the phonetic 喬(喬) (qiáo, 'tall'). This suggests the notion of a 'person' living 'high or distant', metaphorically extending to residing in a different land, or 'abroad'.
etymology.simplification: The simplified form 侨 replaces the semantic 喬(喬) (qiáo, "tall") with the simpler phonetic component 乔(乔) (qiáo).

examples.chinese: 许多华侨(許多華僑)在国外努力工作(在國外努力工作)。
examples.pinyin: Xǔduō huáqiáo zài guówài nǔlì gōngzuò.
examples.english: Many overseas Chinese work hard abroad.

examples.chinese: 他经常思念异国他乡的亲戚(他經常思念異國他鄉的親戚)，尤其是在节假日(尤其是在節假日)。
examples.pinyin: Tā jīngcháng sīniàn yìguó tāxiāng de qīnqī, yóuqí shì zài jiéjiàrì.
examples.english: He often misses his relatives in foreign countries, especially during holidays.

examples.chinese: 海外侨胞(海外僑胞)为家乡的发展做出了贡献(為家鄉的發展做出了貢獻)。
examples.pinyin: Hǎiwài qiáobāo wèi jiāxiāng de fāzhǎn zuòchūle gòngxiàn.
examples.english: Overseas Chinese contribute to the development of their hometowns.
